title: limonium coralloides
intro: Limonium coralloides, also known as pink sea lavender, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region and the Atlantic coast of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Limonium coralloides include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Limonium coralloides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
